detail: Three zero-process raw fresh-process runs failed before native controls, while later native direct, Rust-to-native-shim, raw, and lower-level Add controls passed. Excel had been manually opened and closed earlier in that boot, so the observation was not a valid cold-session baseline.
effect: The evidence is preserved without causal attribution. The rebooted controls-first baseline and ten post-refactor smokes passed, so it does not block the Prompt 05H matrix.
next_action: Maintain zero-process gates for all live matrix children.

detail: The raw range probe calls Application.Hwnd to acquire an owned-process handle before Workbooks.Add. The successful native C++ control obtains Hwnd only after Add and Open. The lower Rust control has a different set of pre-Add capability probes, so this source-order difference is not yet causal evidence.
effect: The rebooted confirmation must separate the raw Hwnd-before-Add sequence from the native Add-before-Hwnd sequence without weakening the zero-process cleanup gate.
next_action: Run a bounded raw pre-Add sequence comparison after reboot, retaining the same generic SDK IDispatch ABI and preserving the original kernel evidence.

detail: After reboot, with no manually opened Excel session and zero pre-existing Excel processes, minimal high-level, full high-level, lower-level, native direct, native shim, raw L/S/X, and all ten post-refactor raw smokes passed.
effect: The Value/Value2 and SAFEARRAY matrix may proceed. The earlier session-transition observation remains historical and is not attributed to a product or ABI defect.
next_action: Maintain per-run zero-process gates while expanding the matrix.

detail: The successful matching-shape and lower-bound SAFEARRAY writes are recorded. Smaller/larger, transposed, rank-1, and rank-3 mismatch attempts remain explicitly untested.
effect: No compatibility claim is made for mismatched SAFEARRAY assignments.
next_action: Add bounded mismatch cases while retaining every partial-write observation.

detail: The representative scalar subset is rerun in S and X. Formula, dynamic-array, and rectangular representative stability repetitions are not yet expanded across modes.
effect: Mode comparison is limited to the recorded scalar subset; absence of a difference is not a general semantic equivalence claim.
next_action: Run the remaining representative formula and rectangular cases in five fresh processes per mode if broader mode stability is required.
